About Me

I turn Google visibility into real business growth.

I'm Kishore Basu, a digital marketing specialist based in Tamil Nadu with hands-on experience managing 18+ client accounts across retail, wellness, education, and tech service industries.

My specialty is Google Business Profile (GMB) optimisation — I've ranked businesses to #1 on Google within 15–21 days, with zero paid advertising. I combine this with Meta Ads management, organic SEO, and a full social media content calendar service.

Every strategy I build is data-first and results-driven. I don't just set up profiles — I monitor, analyse, report, and continuously optimise to keep growing your numbers month on month.

📍
GMB Setup & Optimisation
Full profile setup, service listing, product catalogue, keyword strategy, and local SEO ranking.
🔍
Local SEO & Ranking
#1 organic rankings using on-page SEO, review management & keyword-rich content.
📱
Social Media Management
Content calendar, post + video scheduling, and daily management for 18+ clients.
🎯
Meta Ads
Lead gen, awareness & conversion campaigns. 434K+ reach delivered across 12 campaigns.
📊
Performance Reporting
Monthly deep-dive reports with insights, issue identification, and next-step strategy.
🌐
Organic SEO
Website SEO — ranked Language Pillar #1 in Vellore organically.
What I Offer

Services built for local business growth.

From first-time GMB setup to full-scale multi-location digital marketing — end to end.

01
📍
GMB Setup & Local SEO

Complete Google Business Profile creation, verification support, service & product listing with keyword-optimised descriptions. Ranked clients #1 in under 21 days — ₹0 ad spend.

02
🎯
Meta Ads Management

Facebook and Instagram campaigns — lead generation, messaging conversations, awareness, and product promotion. Maximum reach at the lowest cost per result.

03
📱
Social Media Marketing

Full-service social media management including content strategy, post + video scheduling, platform management across Facebook and Instagram for 18+ active clients.

04
📅
Content Calendar

Strategic monthly content calendars with post types, titles, design status tracking, and DM scheduling. Organised across multiple clients with clear approval workflows.

05
🔍
Organic Website SEO

On-page and off-page SEO for competitive local keywords. Ranked Language Pillar as #1 organic result for "best language institute in Vellore" — beating JustDial listings.

06
📊
Monthly GMB Reports

Detailed month-over-month performance reports with views, interactions, call tracking, direction requests, keyword rankings, issues identified, and a clear action plan.
